payload.quote_governing_principle: once here must not go unstated twice downstream.

Six re-cooked works at the pinned commit: one Ensemble premiere (native-speaker), five Meridian works. Each carries provenance frontmatter (supplier, work, workUrl, gauntlet, inspected).

payload.quote_gate: them into Quick-Snack specials (provenance-locked), gate them
payload.quote_arm_switch: ARM SWITCH — publishing is OFF until you set the repo VARIABLE
payload.honesty_note: The transport is automated but currently PARTIALLY ARMED: the workflow is inert until its API-key secret exists, and auto-publishing is off until the arm variable is set — the apparatus condition recorded as found.

payload.quote_translation_loss: that is exactly the "translation loss" the encounter grammar exists to keep honest.
payload.note: Admission 2026-07-17 with the Plenum as resident collective; the diner's re-voicing is named a declared transformation with translation-loss potential.

payload.quote_hook: The six ''Valid'' manifest stamps were signature-integrity verdicts, not trust verdicts.
payload.quote_caveat_count: Any derived, re-voiced, or republished form of this work must preserve all five, by name:
payload.quote_new_caveat: 5. **"Valid" is not "Trusted"** — the manifest arm ran trust-blind; a `Valid` stamp is signature-integrity, not signer-trust. Under the current forward official C2PA trust list none of these real signers separate from a forge today; only a discontinued legacy list (the ITL) separates them. Any re-serving of a `Valid` result must not present it as an endorsement of the signer, and must carry the today-gap, not only the legacy-list reassurance.
payload.note: Current data-snack.com main updates the existing Split Seal Quick Snack rather than adding a seventh quick item. The open standing relation remains at six re-cooked works; this event records the refreshed re-voicing and its added load-bearing caveat.

payload.quote_gate_step_name: Publish to main (if armed) — else preview only
payload.evidentiary_note: The workflow text itself is unchanged since evt-04 (2026-07-16) and still documents the switch as OFF by default; a GitHub Actions repository VARIABLE's live value is not file content and cannot be quoted or byte-verified the way this record verifies everything else. What changed is observable behavior: starting with commit `99f5c750` (2026-07-18T06:33:48Z, git-authored `data-snack cook bot <bot@data-snack.invalid>`), and repeating on `9a9305fa` (2026-07-19T07:12:22Z) and `607609e9` (2026-07-20T07:45:49Z), commits carrying exactly this workflow step's own commit message string ('feat(quick): auto-cooked special(s) from upstream field/studio [skip ci]') land directly on data-snack.com's main branch, with no pull request. The one and only code path in this workflow that produces such a commit is gated on `vars.PIPELINE_AUTOPUBLISH == 'true'` (the step quoted above). The part-armed state this encounter recorded on 2026-07-16 has therefore become live: the transport now runs and publishes unattended, evidenced by its own output rather than by reading the switch directly.

payload.quote_provenance_supplier: supplier: 'Meridian · field-research (the lab''s foundational research collective, frankbueltge.de)'
payload.note: First corpus growth since the fixture's founding count of six (evt-03, 2026-07-13): 'Comparable With Humans' — Meridian's own instrument, shipped under the pre-gauntlet convention per field-research session 43 (2026-07-17), and separately the 15th work synced to datavism.org under this ecology's enc-2026-003 — was auto-cooked by the now-firing transport (evt-07) the following day, 2026-07-18. This is the automation's first observed real output: the diner did not wait for a human cook. Split-seal was refreshed again in the same commit and in the two nightly runs since (2026-07-19, 2026-07-20); each refresh re-dates provenance/sources and lightly rewords the teaser/hook prose, but the five numbered load-bearing caveats (including caveat 5 added at evt-06) verify unchanged across all three re-cooks — no new correction, so not separately recorded here.
